name: HINO FIRE TRUCK
notes: Based on current station account, this fire truck belongs to the period of FINSP ROGELIO S QUIZON JR.
Based on current station account, this fire truck was acquired during the administration of Mayor Carlos F. Lopez Jr.

name: ISUZU MORITA
description: A vintage and long-serving fire truck that remains a point of pride for Asingan because it is still operational.
notes: Based on current station account, the fire truck arrived in Asingan on August 21, 1981.
The date June 3, 2005 from the source document is being treated as the LTO registration date rather than the original historical arrival date.
This vehicle is regarded locally as historically old and is notable for remaining operational.

name: JIANGTE DONGFENG FIRE TRUCK
notes: Based on current station account, this fire truck belongs to the period of FINSP LORETO M BERNARDINO.
Based on current station account, this fire truck was acquired during the administration of Mayor Heidee Chua.

name: ASINGAN FIRE STATION AMBULANCE
notes: No OR / CR issued by higher office.
Based on current station account, once the Toyota Japan ambulance was in service, Asingan Fire Station was handling close to or not below 100 EMS responses per year.
The exact arrival date of this ambulance in station service has not yet been confirmed.

name: HONDA WAVE
notes: Saved as an official station asset based on project input.
Year was provided as approximate only.

name: L300 RTV
notes: Saved as an official station asset based on project input.
The year provided refers to turnover to the station; exact turnover date was not provided.
Based on current station account, the L300 helped make BFP Asingan more recognized for patient transport.
Based on current station account, this vehicle belongs to the period of FINSP LORETO M BERNARDINO and the administration of Mayor Heidee Chua.
